sentences.target: On se retrouve au parc voisin.

translations.fr: On se retrouve au parc voisin.
translations.en: We're meeting at the nearby park.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el parque cercano.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns im nahegelegenen Park.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在附近的公园见面。
translations.yue: 我哋喺附近嘅公園見面。
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở công viên gần đó.
translations.nl: We ontmoeten elkaar in het park in de buurt.
translations.hi: हम पास के पार्क में मिलते हैं।
translations.nb: Vi møtes i parken i nærheten.
translations.sv: Vi ses i parken i närheten.
translations.ro: Ne vedem în parcul din apropiere.
translations.da: Vi mødes i parken i nærheden.
translations.ja: 近くの公園で会います。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; often used for generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun (3rd person) marking the pronominal verb 'se retrouver'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Simple preposition; contraction of 'à + le' introducing a location complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'parc'.

sentences.target: Il travaille dans le magasin voisin.

translations.fr: Il travaille dans le magasin voisin.
translations.en: He works at the nearby store.
translations.es: Él trabaja en la tienda cercana.
translations.de: Er arbeitet im Laden in der Nähe.
translations.vi: Anh ấy làm việc ở cửa hàng gần đó.
translations.nl: Hij werkt in de winkel in de buurt.
translations.hi: वह पास की दुकान में काम करता है।
translations.nb: Han jobber i butikken i nærheten.
translations.sv: Han jobbar i affären i närheten.
translations.ro: El lucrează la magazinul din apropiere.
translations.da: Han arbejder i butikken i nærheden.
translations.ja: 彼は近くの店で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular, masculine.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Simple preposition indicating location.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'magasin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'dans'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'magasin'.

translations.en: I'm waiting near the café next door.
translations.es: Estoy esperando cerca del café de al lado.
translations.de: Ich warte in der Nähe des Cafés nebenan.
translations.it: Sto aspettando vicino al bar accanto.
translations.ko: 옆에 있는 카페 근처에서 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在隔壁的咖啡馆附近等着。
translations.yue: 我喺隔籬嗰間咖啡店附近等緊。
translations.pt: Estou esperando perto do café ao lado.
translations.he: אני מחכה ליד בית הקפה הצמוד.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi gần quán cà phê bên cạnh.
translations.nl: Ik wacht vlak bij het café hiernaast.
translations.hi: मैं बगल वाले कैफ़े के पास इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg venter i nærheten av kafeen ved siden av.
translations.da: Jeg venter tæt på caféen ved siden af.
translations.ja: 隣のカフェの近くで待っています。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel; 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Adverb functioning as the first element of the complex preposition 'près de' ('near').
Simple preposition; contraction of 'de + le' introducing the complement of 'près'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'café'.

sentences.target: Nous regardons le match au stade voisin.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁəgaʁdɔ̃ lə matʃ o stad vwazɛ̃/

translations.fr: Nous regardons le match au stade voisin.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁəgaʁdɔ̃ lə matʃ o stad vwazɛ̃/
translations.en: We're watching the match at the nearby stadium.
translations.es: Estamos viendo el partido en el estadio cercano.
translations.de: Wir sehen das Spiel im nahegelegenen Stadion.
translations.it: Guardiamo la partita allo stadio vicino.
translations.ko: 우리는 근처 경기장에서 경기를 보고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在附近的体育场看比赛。
translations.yue: 我哋喺附近嘅體育場睇比賽。
translations.ru: Мы смотрим матч на ближайшем стадионе.
translations.pt: Estamos assistindo ao jogo no estádio próximo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xem trận đấu ở sân vận động gần đó.
translations.nl: We kijken naar de wedstrijd in het stadion in de buurt.
translations.uk: Ми дивимося матч на найближчому стадіоні.
translations.hu: A közeli stadionban nézzük a meccset.
translations.hi: हम पास के स्टेडियम में मैच देख रहे हैं।
translations.el: Βλέπουμε τον αγώνα στο κοντινό στάδιο.
translations.nb: Vi ser kampen på stadion i nærheten.
translations.id: Kami menonton pertandingan di stadion terdekat.
translations.sv: Vi tittar på matchen på stadion i närheten.
translations.ro: Urmărim meciul pe stadionul din apropiere.
translations.da: Vi ser kampen på stadion i nærheden.
translations.ja: 近くのスタジアムで試合を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'match'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'regardons'.
Simple preposition; contraction of 'à + le' introducing a location complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'stade'.
